title: Streaming SSE endpoint + LLM streaming in serve.py

log.context: Streaming SSE endpoint + LLM streaming in serve.py

Everything is live. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Changes to `/home/clungus/work/hello-world/serve.py`:**

1. **`_active_streams` dict** — Module-level, guarded by `threading.Lock()`. Schema: `{session_id: {identity, display_name, text, done}}`.

2. **`_call_claude_cli`** (renamed from the old implementation) — Now uses `--output-format streaming-json --max-turns 1` via `Popen`. Parses each JSON line for `type == "assistant"` messages and extracts text blocks, calling `on_token` p...(truncated)
